channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [TIPCO] Tipco Engineering India Ltd Authorizes Key Managerial Personnel to Determine Materiality of Events
item.description:
In accordance with Regulation 30(5) of SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015, the Board of Directors of Tipco Engineering India Ltd has authorized the Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) to determine the materiality of an event or information for disclosure purposes. The KMPs authorized are Ritesh Sharma, the Managing Director, and Kirti Jain, the Company Secretary and Compliance Officer. The decision was made in terms of Regulation 30(5) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015.

  • Tipco Engineering India Ltd authorizes Key Managerial Personnel to determine materiality of events
  • Regulation 30(5) of SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015 is the reference regulation
  • Ritesh Sharma, the Managing Director, and Kirti Jain, the Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, are the authorized KMPs
  • The decision aims to ensure compliance with the SEBI regulations
  • The company is committed to maintaining transparency and disclosure requirements

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tipco Engineering India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [STALLION] Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in the securities of the company for all designated persons and their immediate relatives. This closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's Prohibition of Insider Trading Policy. The closure will be effective from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial results for the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the declaration of these results will be intimated in due course.

  • Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd closes trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • Closure effective from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial results
  • Action taken in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Date of Board Meeting for result declaration to be intimated later
  • Stakeholders informed to take necessary records

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VMM] Vishal Mega Mart Appoints Tapan Kulshrestha as Vice President & Head - Supply Chain
item.description:
Vishal Mega Mart Ltd. has appointed Mr. Tapan Kulshrestha as Vice President & Head – Supply Chain and Senior Management Personnel. Mr. Kulshrestha, with over 24 years of experience in Retail and IT sectors, was previously associated with Trent Hypermarket Pvt. Ltd. and Future Retail Ltd. His appointment is a circular resolution passed on April 01, 2026, replacing Mr. S. Raamesh who ceased to be associated with the Company from January 09, 2026.

  • Appointment of Mr. Tapan Kulshrestha as Vice President & Head – Supply Chain and Senior Management Personnel
  • Mr. Kulshrestha has over 24 years of experience in Retail and IT sectors
  • He was previously associated with Trent Hypermarket Pvt. Ltd. and Future Retail Ltd.
  • His appointment is a replacement for Mr. S. Raamesh
  • Mr. Kulshrestha is recognized for his strong capabilities in supply chain network expansion, process optimization, and technology-driven transformation

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vishal Mega Mart Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [STALLION] Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd has closed the trading window for dealing in the securities of the company for all Designated Persons and their immediate relatives. This is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's Prohibition of Insider Trading Policy. The closure will last from April 01, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the declaration of these results will be intimated in due course.

  • Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd has closed the trading window for Designated Persons and their immediate relatives.
  • The closure is in accordance with SEBI regulations and the company's Prohibition of Insider Trading Policy.
  • The closure will last from April 01, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial results.
  • The Audited Financial results are for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026.
  • The date of the Board Meeting for the declaration of these results will be intimated in due course.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SHRIPISTON] Riken Corporation Rebranded as NPR-RIKEN Nigata Corporation; Technical Collaboration Agreements Transferred to NPR-RIKEN Corporation
item.description:
Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd has informed that the reorganization of its Technical Collaborator, Riken Corporation, has become effective from April 1, 2026. Riken Corporation has been renamed NPR-RIKEN Nigata Corporation. Certain business divisions and contractual rights/obligations of Riken Corporation have been transferred to NPR-RIKEN Corporation under Japanese law. All Technical Assistance Agreements, Technical Collaboration Agreements, and related contracts with the Company now stand succeeded by NPR-RIKEN Corporation, ensuring continuity of technical and commercial arrangements. The reorganization does not impact the shareholding pattern; NPR-RIKEN Nigata Corporation continues to hold 21.30% equity in the Company. A confirmation has been executed between the Company and NPR-RIKEN Corporation acknowledging transfer of all existing agreements with effect from April 1, 2026.

  • Riken Corporation has been renamed NPR-RIKEN Nigata Corporation
  • Certain business divisions and contractual rights/obligations of Riken Corporation have been transferred to NPR-RIKEN Corporation
  • All Technical Assistance Agreements, Technical Collaboration Agreements, and related contracts with the Company now stand succeeded by NPR-RIKEN Corporation
  • NPR-RIKEN Nigata Corporation continues to hold 21.30% equity in the Company
  • A confirmation has been executed between the Company and NPR-RIKEN Corporation acknowledging transfer of all existing agreements

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [ASHOKA] Ashoka Buildcon Extends Completion Date of SPVs Sale to June 30, 2026
item.description:
Ashoka Buildcon Ltd. has announced an extension of the expected date of completion for the sale of its stake in Special Purpose Vehicles (SPVs) up to June 30, 2026. This extension is for the SPVs where the construction works are complete, as agreed upon with the proposed investor. The remaining SPVs will follow thereafter in accordance with their respective transaction documents. This update comes after the company's previous announcement of entering into share purchase agreements with Epic Concesiones 2 Private Limited, Infrastructure Yield Plus II, and Infrastructure Yield Plus IIA for the sale of the entire share capital and management control of the SPVs.

  • Ashoka Buildcon extends the completion date for the sale of its SPVs up to June 30, 2026.
  • The extension applies to SPVs where construction works are complete.
  • The remaining SPVs will follow the new completion date as per their respective transaction documents.
  • This decision comes after the company's previous announcement of entering into share purchase agreements with Epic Concesiones 2 Private Limited, Infrastructure Yield Plus II, and Infrastructure Yield Plus IIA.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ASHOKA BUILDCON LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [NAZARA] Nazara Technologies Approves Preferential Issue with Amended EGM Date
item.description:
Nazara Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange about an update to their previous disclosure regarding the outcome of a Board Meeting held on March 30, 2026. The company approved a Preferential Issue, and the date of the Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) has been amended from Thursday, April 30, 2026, to Friday, May 01, 2026. All other details remain unchanged from the original disclosure.

  • Nazara Technologies approved a Preferential Issue
  • The company amended the EGM date to Friday, May 01, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nazara Technologies Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [PWL] Physicswallah Ltd Grants 79,02,080 Stock Options Under ESOP Plan 2025
item.description:
Physicswallah Limited has informed the exchanges about the grant of stock options to its eligible employees. The Nomination and Remuneration Committee (NRC) approved the grant of 79,02,080 stock options under the Physicswallah Limited Employees' Stock Option Plan 2025 (ESOP Plan 2025) on April 01, 2026. The options, each convertible into one fully paid-up equity share with a face value of INR 1, will vest as per the schedule determined by NRC and can be exercised anytime during the continuous active employment period from the date of vesting.

  • Physicswallah Ltd grants 79,02,080 stock options under ESOP Plan 2025.
  • Each stock option is convertible into one fully paid-up equity share with a face value of INR 1.
  • Options can be exercised anytime during the continuous active employment period from the date of vesting.
  • The equity shares arising from the conversion of options will rank pari passu with all other equity shares.
  • The ESOP Plan 2025 includes terms for dealing with options in case of various events such as death, permanent incapacity, resignation, termination, retirement, abandonment, and corporate actions.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Physicswallah Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [ACMESOLAR] ACME Solar Commissions Fourth Phase of 33.333 MW BESS Project in Rajasthan
item.description:
ACME Solar Holdings Limited, through its subsidiary ACME Sun Power Private Limited, has successfully commissioned the fourth phase of a 33.333 MW/160.48 MWh Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) project. The project is located in Badi Sid, Tehsil-Bap, Dist: Phalodi and Jodhpur, Rajasthan. The Commercial Operation Date (COD) for this phase is April 03, 2026. With this, ACME Sun Power Private Limited has achieved a total commissioned capacity of 133.336 MW / 641.980 MWh out of the total 300 MW/1409.34 MWh capacity.

  • ACME Solar Holdings Limited commissions fourth phase of 33.333 MW/160.48 MWh BESS project in Rajasthan.
  • The Commercial Operation Date (COD) for the fourth phase is April 03, 2026.
  • ACME Sun Power Private Limited has achieved a total commissioned capacity of 133.336 MW / 641.980 MWh out of 300 MW/1409.34 MWh.
  • The project is located in Badi Sid, Tehsil-Bap, Dist: Phalodi and Jodhpur, Rajasthan.
  • ACME Solar Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of ACME Sun Power Private Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [KESORAMIND] Kesoram Industries Ltd Faces INR 70.54 Crore Demand in IT Assessment Order for AY 2024-25
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Kesoram Industries Ltd has received an Income Tax Assessment Order under section 143(3) read with section 144B of the Income Tax Act, 1961, pertaining to AY 2024-25, raising a demand of INR 70.54 Crores. The tax authorities have made certain additions and disallowed certain deductions, including reasons for receipt of the communication. The communication is applicable for FY 2023-24 (AY 2024-25). The Company believes that it has strong factual and legal grounds to nullify the entire demand and is under the process of filing an appeal before the Commissioner of Income Tax (appeals), National Faceless Appeal Centre (NFAC), and a Writ Petition before the Hon’ble High Court against the said order within the prescribed timelines. The Company also intends to file a rectification application.

  • Kesoram Industries Ltd received an Income Tax Assessment Order for AY 2024-25, raising a demand of INR 70.54 Crores.
  • The tax authorities made additions and disallowed deductions for the AY 2024-25.
  • The Company believes it has strong factual and legal grounds to nullify the entire demand.
  • Kesoram Industries Ltd is filing an appeal before the Commissioner of Income Tax (appeals), National Faceless Appeal Centre (NFAC), and a Writ Petition before the Hon’ble High Court against the said order.
  • The Company plans to file a rectification application.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KESORAM INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Legal
